prompt: Photorealistic dramatic military portrait of a man in his late 30s inside the closed cockpit of an F-15E Strike Eagle in flight, wearing a full USAF olive drab flight suit with patches, G-suit, harness straps, HGU-55/P flight helmet with visor fully raised, oxygen mask clipped down below his chin. His face must exactly match the reference: short buzzed dark hair with subtle stubble on the scalp, very short dark stubble beard, brown eyes, olive Mediterranean skin tone, confident focused expression with a slight three-quarter turn, not looking directly at camera. Shot with 70mm lens at f/2.8, ISO 400, dramatic cockpit lighting — bright sky light through canopy glass above, instrument panel glow from below creating a cinematic split light effect. Background shows blue sky and clouds visible through the canopy, F-15E cockpit instruments partially visible. Realistic skin texture with natural imperfections — visible pores, light sweat sheen from the flight suit, no smoothing. Do not alter his facial features. Do not change his hair or beard. Identity must match reference photograph exactly.
negative_prompt: different person, wrong face, bald head, full beard, smooth skin, plastic skin, airbrushed, beauty filter, CGI, 3D render, cartoon, visor down, closed visor, studio backdrop, body proportion averaging, anatomy normalization, symmetrical perfection, skin smoothing, watermark, text overlay
